title: Law Elder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Law Elder''' was a member of the ruling [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] council of [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]]. During the early days of the [[Thrawn campaign]], the Elders opened negotiations to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Bimmisaari ultimately did choose to join the New Republic, and other worlds in the [[Halla sector/Legends|Halla sector]], such as [[Danuta]], followed suit.

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
